title: SpellFixes
description:
This mod addresses a critical compatibility issue between the Invoke and SpellBlades mods. Previously, when a player attempted to cast a specific spell—such as invoking “heo”—the server would crash and log the following error:

[Server thread/INFO]: [STDER
body:
This mod addresses a critical compatibility issue between the Invoke and SpellBlades mods. Previously, when a player attempted to cast a specific spell—such as invoking “heo”—the server would crash and log the following error:

[Server thread/INFO]: [STDERR]: Spell Engine: Trying to perform spell invoke:heo Entity not found: (any)

With this fix, the spell invocation routine now correctly validates entity references before execution, preventing server crashes and ensuring seamless integration between the Invoke and SpellBlades mods.
